observations.summary: The text describes a primordial state characterized by formless void and deep darkness, representing the condition before the emergence of Time.

evidence.quote: Formless void, darkness on the deep—as things must have been before Time

observations.notes: This observation captures the motif of primordial chaos and the absence of temporal order.

observations.summary: The first words of truth were spoken at the dawn of Time, marking the beginning of order and reality.

evidence.quote: when the first words of truth were spoken.

observations.notes: This suggests a cosmogonic moment where truth and speech initiate existence or consciousness.

accepted_observations.summary: The first words of truth were spoken at the dawn of Time, marking the beginning of order and reality.

accepted_observations.notes: This suggests a cosmogonic moment where truth and speech initiate existence or consciousness.
